hooks.command: bash -lc 'for root in "${BOOTSTRAP_WORKFLOW_CODEX_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/davekim917-bootstrap/bootstrap-workflow-agents"/* "$HOME/plugins/bootstrap/plugins/workflow-agents"; do if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/hooks/codex-workflow-hook.mjs" ]; then exec node "$root/hooks/codex-workflow-hook.mjs"; fi; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for root in "${BOOTSTRAP_WORKFLOW_CODEX_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/davekim917-bootstrap/bootstrap-workflow-agents"/* "$HOME/plugins/bootstrap/plugins/workflow-agents"; do if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/hooks/codex-workflow-hook.mjs" ]; then exec node "$root/hooks/codex-workflow-hook.mjs"; fi; done; exit 0'

bash -lc 'for root in "${BOOTSTRAP_WORKFLOW_CODEX_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/davekim917-bootstrap/bootstrap-workflow-agents"/* "$HOME/plugins/bootstrap/plugins/workflow-agents"; do if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/hooks/codex-workflow-hook.mjs" ]; then exec node "$root/hooks/codex-workflow-hook.mjs"; fi; done; exit 0'
